one_time_description: Contributions to Settlement Trust - large non-recurring transfer to settlement trust fund
economic_notes: Nation has investments in multiple partnerships including Matullia Holdings LP (50%) with assets of $14.9M and Xhamasung Holdings LP (50%) with assets of $6.2M. Advance of $4.5M made to Matullia Holdings LP during year. Subsequent to year end, additional mortgage advance of $431,337 for townhomes. Specific land claims loans initiated in March 2023.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Auditor firm name not clearly stated - partners listed suggest a small local CPA firm in Port Coquitlam BC. Significant prior period adjustment restating 2022 figures. Large $2.56M contribution to Settlement Trust distorts expense comparison. Nation has complex structure with 2 consolidated subsidiaries (Nation government funds and Kosapsum Development Corporation) and 6 entities accounted for by modified equity method. James Bay Settlement ongoing - $1.29M revenue in 2023 vs $1.99M in 2022. Accumulated surplus on statement of operations ($31,005,093) differs from accumulated surplus schedule total ($33,693,570) due to elimination of intercompany items. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. Interest revenue in segments ($599,328) differs slightly from income statement ($598,281) due to rounding. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC, CMHC, FNHA, BC Gaming, James Bay Settlement, Province of BC, Coast Salish Employment, Fisheries and Oceans, Other Federal = 8,211,152 - 5,992,720 = 2,218,432.
